ops.note: Met against the rescoped demo bar (07-16 rescope: gated campaign, >=2 experiments proposed → validated → preflighted → run → retro'd under caps — supersedes the original pop→panel→leaderboard flow). Evidence: meta-p6 ledger shows exp 001 (completed, honest negative, DISCARD 0.9317 vs 0.9326) and exp 003 (completed, KEEP 0.9191 vs 0.9180), both retro'd (retros.jsonl n=2, incl. the NegativeRetro path shipped mid-campaign); every gate exercised: per-proposal operator approval/rejection, ceiling refusal (max_units=1 enforced structurally after 382b252e), preflight baseline, spend reservations reconciled to actuals ($3.18 metered), streak halt, replay refusal, stop latch. Caveat carried into the record: both verdicts sit ~13x below the measured between-run instrument band (0.0146) — the campaign demonstrates the MACHINERY, not a model improvement.
